content:
Why? Why? Why? My mom found my diary and the only thing she did was make fun of it. why? why? why did she read it, it isnt for her, it isnt hers, so why? I feel betrayed, anger and disgust. I want to go away, far away, please.
I needed to get this off my chest for now, I am scared to deal with it, I havent talked to her since, i havent looked at her since, i dont want to see her at all. I feel as if I am bare and being laughed at. This isnt fair. This isnt fair. This isnt fair.
worst part is I have no one to talk to, no one to confide in, no one would ever understand though, i hope not.
title: I want to scream and cry but I am unable

content:
Made this post just to say that ajikan is such an amazing band, all their albums are amazing, from all their albums i gotta say that it is between feedback file or magic disk, gosh their music is so fitting for my ears.
I hope I can possible go to one of their concerts and listen to them live.
well, thats all
bye.
title: i love ajikan

content:
Its been a while, hasnt it?
Recently, I have been feeling an immense wave of boredom, a hungering boredom that has consumed me.
Ill try to actually do something with this blog.
bye.
title: boredom

content:
